_comment: Labeled benchmark set for calibrating Ascent's deterministic scoring. Expected levels are PROVISIONAL hand estimates — refine them as you build consensus. Run with: npm run bench (server must be running). See docs/CALIBRATION.md.

repos.note: Curated study list; markdown only — no tests/CI/AI tooling
Small lib; tests + CI but minimal process
Mature framework; tests, CI, docs, conventions
Huge test suite + CI; limited public AI tooling
Modern TS monorepo; tests, CI, changesets
Extensive CI automation, tests, release tooling
AI tooling + agentic signals but sparse public source/tests
D9 anchor: signing/SBOM/SLSA/SAST committed as code; strong rigor, limited AI tooling
D9 anchor: security scanner that ships its own supply-chain config; mature CI/release
